controller.title: 1. Controller
controller.content: The controller responsible for data processing on this website and through our AI agent services is:
controller.address:
utxo AG
Dammstrasse 16, 6300 Zug, Switzerland
Handelsregister-Nummer CH-400.3.450.669-8

scope.title: 2. Scope and Purpose
scope.content1: This privacy policy applies to all services provided by utxo AG, including but not limited to: this website, AI agents operated on behalf of clients, email-based agent interactions, and any related software services (collectively, the "Services").
scope.content2: We process personal data in compliance with the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (FADP/DSG), the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), and the EU Artificial Intelligence Act (EU AI Act) where applicable.

websiteData.title: 3.1 Website Data
websiteData.content: When you visit our website, we may collect: IP address, browser type and version, operating system, referral URL, pages visited, date and time of access, and other technical metadata transmitted by your browser.

aiAgentInteractionData.title: 3.2 AI Agent Interaction Data
aiAgentInteractionData.content: When you interact with our AI agents (via email or other channels), we collect and process:
items: Email addresses, names, and contact information
The full content of emails sent to and received from our AI agents, including attachments
Data retrieved from connected third-party systems (CRM, ERP, databases, APIs) on your behalf or on behalf of your organization
Metadata about agent interactions (timestamps, processing logs, performance metrics)
Any files, documents, or data you provide to or through the agents

businessContactData.title: 3.3 Business Contact Data
businessContactData.content: When you contact us for business inquiries, we collect your name, email address, company name, and any information you voluntarily provide.

legalBasis.title: 4. Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.content: We process personal data on the following legal bases:
items: Contract performance (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR): Processing necessary for the performance of our services as agreed with you or your organization.
Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR): Processing necessary for the operation, improvement, and security of our services, including AI agent training, quality assurance, debugging, and analytics.
Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR): Where you have given explicit consent, which you may withdraw at any time.
Legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR): Processing necessary for compliance with applicable laws.

aiSpecificProcessing.title: 5. AI-Specific Data Processing
aiSpecificProcessing.content: Our AI agents process data using large language models (LLMs) and other machine learning systems. By using our AI agent services, you acknowledge and accept the following:
items: All data sent to or processed by our AI agents may be used for the purpose of delivering, maintaining, improving, and developing our AI services.

Email content, attachments, and any connected system data may be processed by third-party AI infrastructure providers (including but not limited to cloud computing providers and LLM API providers) outside of Switzerland and the EEA.
AI-generated outputs may be logged, stored, and analyzed for quality assurance, debugging, compliance monitoring, and service improvement.
We may use anonymized or aggregated interaction data for research, benchmarking, and model improvement purposes.

In accordance with the EU AI Act, we classify our AI agents as limited-risk AI systems and maintain transparency about their use of artificial intelligence. Users interacting with our agents will be informed that they are communicating with an AI system.

dataSharingAndTransfers.title: 6. Data Sharing and Transfers
dataSharingAndTransfers.content: We may share personal data with:
items: Cloud infrastructure providers for hosting and computing (servers may be located in the EU, US, or other jurisdictions)
AI/LLM providers for processing agent requests
Third-party systems your organization has authorized us to connect to (CRM, ERP, email servers, databases)
Professional advisors (legal, accounting) as necessary
Authorities when required by law
dataSharingAndTransfers.transferSafeguards: Where data is transferred outside Switzerland or the EEA, we rely on adequacy decisions, Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs), or other appropriate safeguards as required by applicable law.

dataRetention.title: 7. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain personal data for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements. AI agent interaction logs may be retained indefinitely for service improvement, compliance, and auditing purposes unless you request deletion and no legal retention obligation applies.

yourRights.title: 8. Your Rights
yourRights.content: Under applicable data protection law (FADP/GDPR), you have the right to:
items: Access the personal data we hold about you
Request correction of inaccurate data
Request deletion of your data (subject to legal retention requirements)
Object to or restrict certain processing activities
Request data portability
Withdraw consent at any time (without affecting prior processing)
Lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (FDPIC in Switzerland, or your local EU data protection authority)
yourRights.contactInfo: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at business@utxo.ag. We may require identity verification before processing your request. We will respond within 30 days as required by law.

cookiesAndTracking.title: 9. Cookies and Tracking
cookiesAndTracking.content: This website may use essential cookies required for its operation. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies. Any analytics, if implemented, will use privacy-respecting tools in compliance with applicable law.

security.title: 10. Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

changesToPolicy.title: 11. Changes to This Policy
changesToPolicy.content: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Changes become effective upon publication on this website. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: 12. Contact
contact.content:
For questions about this privacy policy or our data processing practices, contact:
utxo AG, Dammstrasse 16, 6300 Zug, Switzerland
business@utxo.ag
